sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Q3 Results LIVE: Dalmia Bharat, Tata Communication Profit Doubles
feed.summary: This article provides live updates on Q3 results for various Indian companies, highlighting that Dalmia Bharat and Tata Communications have doubled their profits. It also previews earnings for companies like IndiGo and Dr. Reddy's, and notes a significant drop in Nifty's performance.

feed.title: 18 of the Best Stocks and ETFs to Buy Based on 2026 Expert Forecasts
feed.summary: Morningstar highlights 18 top international stocks and ETFs based on expert forecasts predicting non-US stocks will outperform in the coming years. The article recommends 10 undervalued international stocks from the Morningstar Global Markets ex-US Moat Focus Index and 8 Gold-rated international stock ETFs. It also discusses the benefits and risks of international investing, emphasizing diversification and potential for outperformance, while cautioning about currency risk, political conflicts, and volatility.

feed.title: Netflix Earnings: Strong, as Expected; 2026 Guidance Confirms Decelerating Growth
feed.summary: Netflix's fourth-quarter revenue increased 17% year-over-year, aligning with Morningstar's expectations. However, the 2026 guidance, projecting 11-13% organic sales growth and 2 percentage points of margin expansion, consistent with Morningstar's forecast, indicates a decelerating growth pace for the company. Morningstar maintains its fair value estimate for Netflix at USD 79, adjusting it from USD 77 due to the time value of money, and views the stock as fairly valued, noting its narrow moat and high quality among peers.

feed.title: Jacobs Solutions (J) Receives a Buy from KeyBanc
feed.summary: KeyBanc analyst Sangita Jain maintained a Buy rating on Jacobs Solutions (J) with a price target of $154.00, following an earlier Buy rating from RBC Capital. This comes despite a recent Hold rating reiterated by TipRanks – Google. The company reported a quarterly revenue of $3.15 billion and a net profit of $110.75 million, and corporate insider sentiment for the stock is positive, with recent share purchases by the CFO.

feed.title: Analysts Are Neutral on Top Financial Stocks: Prudential Financial (PRU), M&T Bank (MTB)
feed.summary: Analysts have issued neutral ratings for top financial stocks Prudential Financial (PRU) and M&T Bank (MTB), indicating a balanced outlook for both. For Prudential Financial, Alex Scott of Barclays maintained a Hold rating with a $124.00 price target, aligning with a general analyst consensus of Hold for the company. Similarly, Jason Goldberg of Barclays maintained a Hold rating on M&T Bank with a $236.00 price target, despite the stock having a Moderate Buy consensus.

feed.title: Rambus (RMBS) Valuation Check As Shares React To Earnings Expectations And Server Memory Demand
feed.summary: Rambus (RMBS) is attracting investor attention ahead of its earnings call, with its share price recently rising due to anticipation of new guidance on server memory demand. The stock's current Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 51.8x is significantly higher than its estimated fair P/E of 37.7x and industry averages, suggesting it may be overvalued. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model also indicates the shares are trading above their estimated fair value of US$88.24, prompting questions about whether market expectations are stretched.

feed.title: Verizon’s Frontier Deal Expands Fiber Reach As Acer Lawsuit Looms
feed.summary: Verizon Communications has received regulatory approval for its acquisition of Frontier Communications, expected to expand its fiber network and broadband customer base. This deal significantly increases Verizon's fiber footprint, aiming to reach nearly 30 million homes and businesses. Simultaneously, Verizon faces a new patent infringement lawsuit from Acer regarding cellular networking technology, adding a legal and financial challenge to manage alongside the integration of Frontier's assets.

feed.title: Inscription Capital LLC Makes New Investment in Pentair plc $PNR
feed.summary: Inscription Capital LLC has made a new investment in Pentair plc, purchasing 9,968 shares valued at approximately $1,104,000. Other institutional investors also increased their holdings in Pentair, which recently declared an increased quarterly dividend of $0.27 per share. Analysts have issued varied ratings, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $115.75.

feed.title: Netflix Earnings: Strong, as Expected; 2026 Guidance Confirms Decelerating Growth
feed.summary: Netflix reported strong fourth-quarter 2025 revenue growth of 17% and an expanded operating margin. However, 2026 guidance projects a deceleration to 11%-13% organic sales growth, aligning with Morningstar's forecast of a maturing U.S. market. Despite the slowdown and challenges in international growth, Morningstar maintains its fair value estimate, noting Netflix remains the highest-quality among its peers with a narrow moat.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz: Berkshire Sale Doesn’t Sway Our Stance That Shares Are a Bargain
feed.summary: Despite Berkshire Hathaway's announced exit from Kraft Heinz, Morningstar maintains its "bargain" rating for KHC shares, affirming a $51 fair value estimate. The firm believes Kraft Heinz's strategic plan to invest in its brands and capabilities is sound, expecting it to stabilize assets and drive annual sales growth and operating margins. Morningstar suggests the market is waiting for clearer volume improvements before granting a higher valuation, but anticipates a planned split of Kraft Heinz's segments could unlock additional value.

feed.title: Cboe Mourns Loss of Edward Joyce
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets announced the passing of Edward J. Joyce, former President and Chief Operating Officer, on January 15. Joyce had a distinguished 38-year career at Cboe, playing a pivotal role in shaping the exchange and the U.S. options industry. He was recognized for his contributions with the Joseph W. Sullivan Award in 2012, and Cboe will hold a moment of silence in his honor.

feed.title: Assessing Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Valuation After BlackCAT Success And New Defense Imaging Wins
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) is gaining attention due to the success of its imaging hardware on NASA's BlackCAT CubeSat mission and recent defense imaging contract wins, alongside an 11.02% share price increase over 30 days. The company's valuation indicates it is trading at a P/E of 32.5x, which is a premium compared to the broader US Electronic industry average but a discount to some analyst targets and an intrinsic value estimate. While the P/E suggests overvaluation, a discounted cash flow model presents a more balanced picture, showing a slight discount to intrinsic value.

feed.title: Does Revvity’s 2025 Guidance and Lilly AI Tie-Up Reframe the Bull Case for RVTY?
feed.summary: Revvity (RVTY) has issued 2025 revenue guidance of approximately US$772 million for Q4 and US$2.86 billion for the full year, indicating steady mid-single-digit growth. Additionally, the company announced a collaboration with Eli Lilly to integrate Lilly’s TuneLab AI models into Revvity Signals, aiming to enhance drug discovery. While the guidance suggests stability rather than rapid acceleration, the Lilly AI tie-up could strengthen Revvity's commercial traction for its new AI offerings, despite existing concerns about its rich earnings multiple and negative long-term returns.

feed.title: Centene Extends Palliative Care Reach As Buckeye Partnered With Tuesday Health
feed.summary: Centene's Buckeye Health Plan has partnered with Tuesday Health to expand palliative care services for seriously ill Ohio residents within Medicaid and Medicare Advantage. This move aligns with Centene's strategy to enhance care models for vulnerable populations and could impact its presence in government-sponsored healthcare. The announcement is significant for investors following Centene's efforts to refine its service offerings for high-need patients and potentially improve patient outcomes and program uptake.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Leads Funding of Kenyan Fresh-Food Distributor
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has led a funding round for an unnamed Kenyan fresh-food distributor. This investment highlights growing international interest in the agricultural and food supply chain sectors within Africa.

feed.title: Is Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) Pricing Reflect Its Recent Share Price Slide?
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) has seen a recent decline in its share price. Despite this, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is significantly undervalued, with an estimated intrinsic value of US$55.94 compared to its current US$20.37. The company's P/E ratio of 13.98x is also below industry and peer averages, further indicating potential undervaluation.

feed.title: Telefônica Brasil's (BVMF:VIVT3) three-year earnings growth trails the 25% YoY shareholder returns
feed.summary: Telefônica Brasil (BVMF:VIVT3) has seen its share price rise 68% over three years, with a total shareholder return (TSR) of 94% over the same period due to dividends. However, its earnings per share (EPS) grew at a slower rate of 4.2% annually over three years, indicating increased market optimism without commensurate fundamental growth. The company's recent one-year TSR of 44% suggests improved performance.

feed.title: Berkeley Inc Buys 15,080 Shares of Paycom Software, Inc. $PAYC
feed.summary: Berkeley Inc increased its stake in Paycom Software Inc. (NYSE:PAYC) by 119.9% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 15,080 shares to bring its total holdings to 27,654 shares valued at $5.76 million. Despite this increased institutional investment, several analysts recently cut their price targets for Paycom, and the company reported quarterly EPS of $1.94, missing consensus estimates by $0.02. Paycom's stock trades near $147.61, has a market capitalization of $8.31 billion, and offers a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: NVIDIA Corporation $NVDA Shares Acquired by Code Waechter LLC
feed.summary: Code Waechter LLC significantly increased its stake in NVIDIA (NVDA) by 59.0% in Q3 2025, now holding 7,853 shares valued at approximately $1.414 million. This makes NVIDIA its 20th-largest holding. Despite general positive sentiment from Wall Street analysts with an average "Moderate Buy" rating, the company faces near-term challenges such as China export uncertainties and notable insider selling.

feed.title: United States Slide Stainer Market Insights and Competitive
feed.summary: DataM Intelligence has published a new research report on the "Slide Stainer Market Size 2025," providing insights into regional growth, segmentation, CAGR, and business revenue of top key players. The report projects significant growth for the Global Slide Stainer Market between 2025 and 2032, driven by rising adoption of strategies by key players and continuous advancements. It highlights key market players, recent M&A activities, and key developments such as the launch of next-gen automated slide stainers and AI-powered quality control features.

feed.title: A Look At Modine Manufacturing’s (MOD) Valuation As Airedale Unveils New High‑Density Data Center Cooling Solutions
feed.summary: Modine Manufacturing (MOD) recently introduced new Airedale data center cooling solutions for high-density environments, a relevant development given the increased focus on energy efficiency. The stock is currently trading at a significant discount to analyst targets and its intrinsic value, despite recent share price choppiness. Analysts project substantial growth for Modine's data center revenue, potentially doubling to $2 billion by fiscal '28, driven by the expanding need for advanced cooling solutions in digital infrastructure.

feed.title: Pacira BioSciences, Inc. (PCRX) Investigation: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Encourages Shareholders to Contact the Firm to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims on behalf of purchasers of Pacira BioSciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: PCRX) securities. The investigation concerns whether Pacira and its officers/directors engaged in corporate wrongdoing. Shareholders who purchased Pacira securities before August 2, 2023, and still hold them, are encouraged to contact the firm to assist with the investigation.

feed.title: Energy Fuels moves to buy ASM in $299 million rare earths deal
feed.summary: Energy Fuels Inc. is seeking to acquire Australia's ASM Resources for $299 million (A$450 million), aiming to boost its position in the rare earths supply chain. This move would provide Energy Fuels with full ownership of ASM's Dubbo project, which holds resources for various critical materials including rare earths, zirconium, niobium, and hafnium. The proposed deal highlights Energy Fuels' strategy to integrate mining and processing capabilities for diverse critical minerals to support industrial demands.

feed.title: Southside Bancshares (NASDAQ:SBSI) Share Price Crosses Above 200-Day Moving Average - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Southside Bancshares (NASDAQ:SBSI) stock recently crossed above its 200-day moving average, trading at $31.88 with a 4.5% dividend yield. Despite this, analyst ratings remain cautious with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $33.50. Recent insider activity showed a director acquiring over 1,800 shares, and institutional investors have been adjusting their positions in the company.

feed.title: Marketers Face Higher Expectations Across Search and AI Tools, Gartner Finds
feed.summary: A new Gartner survey reveals that despite the rise of generative AI, consumers still heavily rely on traditional search engines, forcing marketers to optimize content for both AI-driven discovery and classic search channels. The report also highlights increased consumer expectations for data governance, transparency in AI, and the need for brands to adapt their strategies to ethical personalization and content authenticity as AI agents become more prevalent. Marketers must now focus on real-time, AI-driven interaction systems and strong data practices to meet evolving customer demands and maintain trust.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty Inc. $ULTA Shares Sold by Berkeley Inc
feed.summary: Berkeley Inc reduced its stake in Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ:ULTA) by 29.7% in Q3, selling 3,164 shares, though institutional investors still own a significant 90.39% of the company. Ulta Beauty reported robust Q3 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with EPS of $5.14 and revenue of $2.86 billion, and is currently trading near its 1-year high. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock, with an average target price of $610.64, and the company has provided strong FY2025 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL is Duncker Streett & Co. Inc.'s 5th Largest Position
feed.summary: Duncker Streett & Co. Inc. increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 5.8% during the third quarter, making it their 5th largest position. Alphabet delivered a strong earnings report, beating analyst estimates, and currently holds a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with a $329.08 average price target from Wall Street analysts. Despite insider selling, institutional ownership remains at over 40%, reflecting continued confidence in the company, though the stock has recently faced pressure from a tech-led market sell-off.

feed.title: Lottery.Com Inc. Announces Closing Of Registered Direct Public Offering
feed.summary: Lottery.Com Inc. has announced the closing of its registered direct public offering. The article, sourced from Reuters, provides minimal details beyond this announcement, indicating it was less than a minute read.

feed.title: Berkeley Inc Has $3.49 Million Stock Position in Ross Stores, Inc. $ROST
feed.summary: Berkeley Inc reduced its stake in Ross Stores by 25.1% in Q3, selling 7,671 shares and now holding 22,885 shares valued at $3.49 million. Ross Stores reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst expectations, and provided optimistic guidance for FY2025 and Q4. Analysts have largely maintained "Moderate Buy" ratings, with several raising price targets for the company's stock.

feed.title: Viatris launches heart failure drug Inpefa in UAE, first outside US
feed.summary: Viatris Inc. has launched its heart failure drug Inpefa (sotagliflozin) in the United Arab Emirates, marking its first commercial release outside the U.S. The drug, a dual SGLT1/2 inhibitor, is approved to reduce cardiovascular risks in adults with heart failure or type 2 diabetes with chronic kidney disease. This expansion follows positive Phase 3 trial results and Viatris's licensing agreement with Lexicon Pharmaceuticals, with further international launches planned.

feed.title: FCX Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE) Pre-market Jan 21, 2026: +2.32% to 60.07 ahead of Q4 report
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) is up 2.32% to $60.07 in pre-market trading on January 21, 2026, ahead of its Q4 earnings report on January 22, driven by strong copper prices and project optimism. While the Meyka AI model gives a "BUY" grade with a short-term target of $61.00, it projects a 12-month downside. Investors are focused on realized copper prices, Indonesian volumes, and potential operational risks amidst overbought technicals.

feed.title: Top 10: Franchises
feed.summary: This article ranks the top 10 global food franchises based on the number of stores, highlighting their brand strength, operational models, and strategies for sustained growth. It features well-known names like McDonald's, Subway, KFC, Burger King, and others, detailing their key characteristics and why they are successful franchise investments. The piece emphasizes the importance of digital ordering, delivery, menu innovation, and strong franchisee support in today's competitive quick-service restaurant sector.

feed.title: Bailard Inc. Reduces Position in The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: Bailard Inc. decreased its stake in The TJX Companies by 3.4% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 7,621 shares. Despite this, TJX Companies reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for TJX, with several firms raising their price targets, and institutional ownership remains high at over 91%.

feed.title: Bailard Inc. Boosts Stake in Steel Dynamics, Inc. $STLD
feed.summary: Bailard Inc. increased its stake in Steel Dynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ:STLD) by 12.0% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 101,166 shares valued at $14.1 million. Institutional investors now own 82.41% of the company's stock. Several analysts have raised their price targets for Steel Dynamics, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $182.

feed.title: Bailard Inc. Boosts Stake in Oracle Corporation $ORCL
feed.summary: Bailard Inc. has increased its stake in Oracle Corporation by 3.7% in Q3, now owning 83,991 shares worth $23.62 million, with institutional investors holding 42.44% of the company. Despite positive earnings and analyst ratings, Oracle faces near-term risks from market stress, a bondholder lawsuit related to its debt-funded AI strategy, and recent insider selling. The company reported EPS of $2.26, exceeding estimates, and announced a $0.50 quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a $305.50 target.

feed.title: Arkadios Wealth Advisors Sells 11,715 Shares of General Dynamics Corporation $GD
feed.summary: Arkadios Wealth Advisors significantly reduced its stake in General Dynamics Corporation by 49.4% in the third quarter, selling 11,715 shares and retaining 12,007 shares valued at $4.10 million. This follows a trend of insider selling, including VP David Paddock's sale of 20,360 shares for $6.82 million. Despite this, analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $366.70, after General Dynamics exceeded quarterly EPS estimates and announced a $1.50 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips $COP Holdings Decreased by Bailard Inc.
feed.summary: Bailard Inc. significantly reduced its stake in ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) by 8.4% in the third quarter of 2025, selling over 16,000 shares. Despite this reduction, ConocoPhillips demonstrated strong financial performance, beating Q3 earnings and revenue estimates and increasing its quarterly dividend. The article also highlights notable insider trading activity, with CEO Ryan Lance selling a large number of shares, while institutional ownership remains high.

feed.title: AMGEN INC (NASDAQ:AMGN) Shows High Technical and Setup Ratings for Potential Breakout
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ: AMGN) is highlighted as strongly positioned for a potential breakout, exhibiting high ChartMill Technical and Setup Quality Ratings. The biotechnology company demonstrates sustained strength across various time periods, trading above its key moving averages and outperforming 81% of all stocks over the past year. Its current trading pattern shows a period of consolidation within a narrow band, providing a defined entry and exit strategy for technical investors.

feed.title: Saudi Arabia’s first car factory leans on Rockwell to build EV talent
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation announced an expanded collaboration with Lucid to support Lucid's new electric vehicle manufacturing facility in King Abdullah Economic City, Saudi Arabia. Rockwell will deploy its FactoryTalk® MES platform to provide real-time visibility and control across various production shops and will also provide training programs to develop Saudi EV manufacturing talent, supporting the Kingdom's Vision 2030. This initiative aims to enhance operational efficiency, quality, and scalability for Lucid and contribute to sustainable industrial growth in the region.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation to Power Lucid's EV Manufacturing Facility in Saudi Arabia with Advanced Software Solutions
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation is expanding its collaboration with Lucid to equip Lucid's electric vehicle manufacturing facility in King Abdullah Economic City, Saudi Arabia, with advanced software solutions, including its FactoryTalk® MES. This partnership aims to optimize production operations, support the manufacturing of Lucid's future midsize vehicles, and contribute to Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 by developing a skilled local workforce in EV manufacturing. The collaboration highlights Rockwell Automation's commitment to digital transformation and sustainable industrial growth in the region.

feed.title: Kolmar Korea, Eastman Collaborate to Develop Eco-friendly Makeup Materials
feed.summary: Kolmar Korea is partnering with the global chemical company Eastman to develop sustainable makeup materials, specifically targeting the replacement of microplastics in color cosmetics. This collaboration aims to introduce eco-friendly recycled materials focusing on cellulose and biodegradable polymers, enhancing Kolmar Korea's competitiveness in North American and European markets where environmental regulations are stringent. The initiative underscores their commitment to combining sustainability with functionality in cosmetic products.

feed.title: Dow Stock: The Downside Has Reset, But The Turnaround Isn’t Proven Yet (NYSE:DOW)
feed.summary: Dow (DOW) has been upgraded from a cautious Hold to a high-quality Hold, as downside risks have significantly decreased since June 2025. The company has shown positive free cash flow, improved liquidity, and stable tangible book value, reflecting effective balance sheet management despite weak demand. While valuations are attractive near book value, confirmation of sustainable free cash flow and dividend coverage in Q4 is crucial before a further upgrade to Buy, as growth has been deferred in favor of cash preservation.

feed.title: AvalonBay Dividend Tax Clarity Highlights Valuation Appeal And Key Risks
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) has provided clarity on the 2025 dividend tax classifications, which is crucial for investors' tax planning, especially given an increased focus on after-tax income. Despite a mixed stock performance, the company is flagged as undervalued by Simply Wall St's model, trading about 36.8% below its estimated fair value. Key considerations for investors include the 3.93% dividend yield and a P/E of 21.6, though a watchpoint is the forecast decline in earnings and debt not well covered by operating cash flow, potentially impacting dividend sustainability.

feed.title: Arkadios Wealth Advisors Has $3.86 Million Position in S&P Global Inc. $SPGI
feed.summary: Arkadios Wealth Advisors significantly increased its stake in S&P Global Inc. (NYSE:SPGI) during the third quarter, boosting its holdings by 55.9% to 7,939 shares valued at $3.864 million. This move comes as S&P Global reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with $4.73 EPS and $3.89 billion in revenue, and provided optimistic FY2025 earnings guidance. The company maintains a "Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $615.64, and institutional investors collectively own 87.17% of its stock.

feed.title: Trump signs order to restrict Wall Street firms from buying single-family homes
feed.summary: US President Donald Trump has signed an executive order to restrict Wall Street firms from buying single-family homes, aiming to preserve homeownership opportunities for American families and address affordability concerns. The order directs his administration to issue guidance for restricting sales and tasks the Treasury, Justice Department, and Federal Trade Commission to review and potentially revise rules and enforce antitrust laws against institutional investors. This move aligns with previous criticisms from Democrats regarding corporate homebuying's impact on housing costs.

feed.title: KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. (KLC) Investigation: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Encourages Shareholders to Contact the Firm to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. (NYSE: KLC) regarding potential corporate wrongdoing. The firm is encouraging shareholders who purchased KinderCare securities before October 9, 2024, and continue to hold them, to contact them to assist with the investigation. The investigation focuses on whether the company and its officers/directors engaged in misconduct.

feed.title: Minim (FIEE) Stock Price, News & Analysis $FIEE
feed.summary: Minim Inc. (NASDAQ: FIEE) is a technology company specializing in network intelligence and security solutions, offering a cloud-based platform for network management, device monitoring, and automated troubleshooting. The company's stock is currently trading at $3.63, having increased by 13.1% year-to-date, with a consensus analyst rating of "Sell." Minim has faced negative earnings and a negative net margin, but also shows healthy short interest levels and high institutional ownership.

feed.title: ProShares Ultra S&P500 (NYSEARCA:SSO) Share Price Pass Above 200 Day Moving Average – What’s Next?
feed.summary: ProShares Ultra S&P500 (SSO) saw its share price move above its 200-day moving average, reaching $56.99 with significant trading volume. The stock has a market capitalization of $7.93 billion and a price-to-earnings ratio of 24.25. Several institutional investors, including Howard Capital Management Inc. and Assetmark Inc., have recently adjusted their positions in SSO.

feed.title: GEA Group Aktiengesellschaft: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG [the German Securities Trading Act] with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
feed.summary: GEA Group Aktiengesellschaft has disclosed a notification of major holdings, indicating a change in the breakdown of voting rights due to a voluntary group notification related to a change in Group Structure. BlackRock, Inc. reported a total position of 9.13% voting rights in GEA Group Aktiengesellschaft as of January 19, 2026, comprising 8.84% voting rights attached to shares and 0.29% through instruments. This marks an increase from the previous notification of 8.98%.

feed.title: Avidian Wealth Enterprises LLC Has $51.57 Million Position in Schwab Intermediate-Term U.S. Treasury ETF $SCHR
feed.summary: Avidian Wealth Enterprises LLC has significantly increased its stake in the Schwab Intermediate-Term U.S. Treasury ETF (SCHR), boosting its holdings by 3.9% during the third quarter. The firm now owns 2,051,937 shares, valued at approximately $51.57 million, making SCHR its tenth largest position. Other institutional investors have also recently adjusted their positions in SCHR, while the ETF's stock opened at $24.97 and tracks investment-grade U.S. Treasury debt.
